heading: Retention after becoming qualified for retired pay
label: 12308 Retention after becoming qualified for retired pay
text: Any person who has qualified for retired pay under chapter 1223 of this title may, with his consent and by order of the Secretary concerned, be retained on active duty, or in service in a reserve component other than that listed in . A member so retained shall be credited with that service for all purposes.section 12732(b) of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)67610:1036a(e).34:440i(e)., .June 29, 1948, ch. 708, § 302(e)62 Stat. 1088The words “active duty, or in service, in a reserve component other than that listed in ” are inserted to reflect the words “Federal service”, as used in Title III of the source statute. The words “that service for all purposes” are substituted for 10:1036a(e) (last 11 words) and 34:440i(e) (last 11 words). The words “upon attaining the age of sixty years” are omitted as surplusage.section 1332(b) of this title
Amendments1994—, substituted “1223” for “67” and “12732(b)” for “1332(b)”.Pub. L. 103–337, § 1675(c)(6), renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 103–337, § 1662(e)(2)section 676 of this title
